feature: Photo to Comic P1.5 - Quality Check & Failure Masking
summary: All P1.5 features verified working: Photo quality scoring with OpenCV YuNet face detection, quality check UI with pass/warn/fail indicators, generate button disabled when can_proceed=false, calm messaging (no scary language), READY_WITH_WARNINGS status handling.

tests.name: Quality check no-face image returns can_proceed=false, overall=poor
Quality check real face photo returns can_proceed=true, overall=good
Quality check caching works (same image hash returns cached result)
Job status endpoint exists and works
PDF download works for completed job
Quality check UI shows after photo upload (face image)
Quality checks displayed: Face, Clarity, Lighting, Framing
Generate button ENABLED when face detected (can_proceed=true)
Quality check shows 'Low' for no-face image
Generate button DISABLED for no-face image (can_proceed=false)
No scary language in UI (no 'Generation Failed', 'error generating')

seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing test images at /tmp/test_no_face.jpg and /tmp/test_real_face.jpg
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.5 quality check features fully tested. YuNet model at /app/backend/models/face_detection_yunet.onnx. Quality check endpoint at POST /api/photo-to-comic/quality-check. Frontend quality check UI appears after photo upload with data-testid='quality-check'. Generate button disabled when can_proceed=false. STATUS_CONFIG for FAILED shows 'Let's Try Again' (calm messaging).

verified_features.quality_check_endpoint: POST /api/photo-to-comic/quality-check returns face_detected, blur_score, brightness, overall, checks, can_proceed
verified_features.caching: Same image hash returns cached result from MongoDB quality_cache collection
verified_features.ui_quality_display: Shows Photo Quality badge (Good/Acceptable/Low) with Face/Clarity/Lighting/Framing indicators
verified_features.calm_messaging: FAILED status shows 'Let's Try Again' not 'Generation Failed'
verified_features.ready_with_warnings: READY_WITH_WARNINGS treated same as COMPLETED in job status endpoint
